h1.visual_description: Bold, numbered (e.g., '3.'), largest font size on page, left-aligned with hanging indent for text.
h1.example_text: 3. Perspective of supply and demand balance of wood pellets and cost structure in Japan

visual_matchers.visual_description: Bold, centered text placed above a graphic.
Smaller font size, plain text located directly below a graphic or its legend.
Plain text defining acronyms, typically found below figures.

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Parenthetical references to figures (e.g., '(Figure 4.5)') and explicit 'Source:' attributions below graphics.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Centered Arabic numerals at the bottom of the page representing page numbers.
